body_txt: A common way for a character to announce themself in an intimidating manner. It doesn't matter whether he's a good or bad guy, as long as the character is badass enough to live up to this claim. That is, unless people are spoofing this line (often by the second character describing his actual worst nightmare ). It can also be used as a Characterization Trope . The person using this stock phrase is a Geek of sorts, based on the fact that he uses Cliches to present himself. Compare Prepare to Die . Here is a compilation with many examples of this quote. It is on its way to becoming a Discredited Trope because it is so often used that it has become a parody, and many people don't find it terrifying anymore.
